scope.target: Migrate implementer skills to a scope-first taxonomy.
scope.dependency_radius: Skill registry, runtime wrappers, human guides, dev-workflow profile, and root routing.
constraints: Remove old skill names directly; do not retain deprecated aliases.
Preserve old skill restrictions as new skill constraints or mode references unless explicitly changed.
Command/query/reactor become slice modes or references.
non_goals: Do not rewrite historical workflow artifacts.

user_constraints: slice-implementer is the bounded implementation slice skill.
local-change-implementer is lower-level local technical execution.

steps: Create slice-implementer canonical skill and mode references.
Create runtime wrappers for new skills.
Remove old canonical and runtime skill directories.
Update registries, guides, dev-workflow profile, and root routing.
validation: rg old and new skill names.
